home.lede: Kuzindikira & kutsimikizira kwa Vortex netiweki ya anzawo.
home.fingerprintDesc: Lembani kiyi wagulu iyi mu kasitomala wanu Vortex. Yankho lililonse lochokera kwa wowongolera limasainidwa nalo - kusagwirizana kumatanthauza kuti wina akusokoneza.
home.step2: Sankhani Global network mode mu wizard yokhazikitsira.
home.step3: Matani ulalo wowongolera (yothetsedwa yokha kudzera SNS) kapena ulalo wolowera patsambali.
home.step4: Tsimikizirani kuti pubkey mu pulogalamu yanu ikufanana ndi zala zomwe zili pamwambapa.
home.step5: Mwalumikizidwa. Zina zonse (mndandanda wa ma node, siginecha) zimayendetsedwa zokha.
home.nodesDesc: Anzanu onse olembetsedwa, zolemera zawo, zomaliza, ndi magwero otsimikizira.
home.entriesDesc: Ma URL a Bootstrap amakasitomala oyamba - Cloudflare tunnel, Tor, IPFS, molunjika.
home.mirrorsDesc: Othandizira ena omwe akupereka zomwezi zomwe zasainidwa ngati ataunika.
home.securityDesc: Kufotokozera kwathunthu kwazomwe zatsimikiziridwa ndi cryptographically, zomwe sizinatsimikizidwe, komanso chifukwa chiyani.

nodes.title: Ma node olembetsa
nodes.lede: Mnzake aliyense wowongolera amadziwa. Makasitomala amawerenga mndandandawu, tsimikizirani siginecha, ndikusankha mfundo yolumikizira kutengera kulemera. Node yatsopano yosindikizidwa imalemera 1.0; Manode akale kapena osasindikizidwa amawola ku 0 kotero kuti magalimoto amayenda kukakhala, anzawo odalirika okha.
nodes.legendDualD: Adalembetsedwa ndi wowongolera NDIKUsindikizidwa pa unyolo kudzera pa Solana. Mboni ziwiri zodziyimira pawokha zimatsimikizira code hashi.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Adalembetsedwa ndi HTTP wowongolera. Siginecha imatsimikizira kuti node ili ndi kiyi yake yachinsinsi, koma kukhulupirika kwa code sikunazikika pa unyolo.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Amadziwika kuchokera ku fayilo ya config kapena miseche. Sizinatsimikizidwebe. Chitani mosamala - aliyense akhoza kulengeza pubkey mpaka umboni utafika.

entries.title: Ma URL olowera
entries.lede: Zoyambira kwa kasitomala yemwe alibe anzawo. Ulalo uliwonse wolowera ndi njira yofikira wowongolera — kudzera mumsewu wa Cloudflare, Tor, IPFS khomo, kapena dera lolunjika. Koperani iliyonse mu pulogalamu yanu ya Vortex poyambitsa koyamba.
entries.typeTunnelD: Adilesi yaulere *.trycloudflare.com. Palibe akaunti yofunika. Ulalo umasintha pomwe ngalandeyo iyambiranso - khalani ngati ephemeral.
entries.typeTorD: .anyezi adiresi, kupezeka kokha kudzera Tor. Zotsimikizira, zochedwetsa. Imafunika Tor kasitomala kapena mlatho.
entries.typeIpfsD: Kope yolumikizidwa ndi zinthu za static frontend. Amatumizidwa kuchokera ku IPFS pachipata chilichonse - palibe seva imodzi yoletsa.
entries.typeDirectD: Nthawi zonse domain + TLS. Yachangu kwambiri koma yotsekeka pamlingo wa DNS/IP.

mirrors.title: Tsamba lagalasi
mirrors.lede: Malo ena omwe ali ndi zomwe zasainidwa ndi tsamba lino. Zothandiza ngati vortexx.sol yatsekedwa pa DNS/ISP yanu. Kalilore aliyense amawunikidwa nthawi ndi nthawi - dontho lachikuda limawonetsa zotsatira zomaliza.
mirrors.healthyD: Ndinayesa mkati mwa mphindi 5 zapitazi ndikuyankha OK. Zotetezeka kugwiritsa ntchito pompano. Kuchedwa kumawonetsedwa pakhadi.
mirrors.unreachableD: Kufufuza komaliza kunalephera - kulumikizana kwakana, kutha, 5xx. Galasiyo ikhoza kukhala yotsika, yotsekedwa, kapena yodzaza. Yesani yotsatira.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .anyezi mirrors sangathe kuwunika thanzi popanda woyimira Tor wapafupi. Zomwe sizikudziwika - gwiritsani ntchito msakatuli wa Tor kuyesa.

security.title: Chitetezo chitsanzo
security.lede: Ndendende zomwe zimatsimikiziridwa mwachinsinsi, zomwe sizili, komanso momwe kiyi iliyonse mudongosolo imapezera - kapena kutaya - kudalira kwanu. Werengani izi musanalumikize makasitomala atsopano kwa owongolera omwe simudziyendetsa nokha.
security.treasurySub: Chikwama cha Solana chomwe chimalandira ndalama za protocol (ndalama zolembetsa kuchokera ku node zatsopano + kudulidwa kwa 20% kwa zolembetsa zolipira) ndikugawa zina zonse monga mphotho kwa ogwira ntchito. Aliyense akhoza kuwunika zomwe zalowa/zotuluka pa unyolo.
security.treasury1: On-chain transparency - adilesi yomwe ili pamwambapa ndi mwini wake wa vortexx.sol pa Solana Name Service. Kulowa kulikonse (ndalama zolembetsera, zolembetsa) ndi malipiro aliwonse ndi Solana ntchito yosainidwa — yotsimikiziridwa ndi aliyense, kuphatikiza inu.
security.treasury2: <strong>Kugawa kwandalama Malipiro olembetsa anchor node identity ndi anti-sybil.
security.treasury3: Custody Caveat - mpaka mgwirizano wanzeru wolipira utatumizidwa, treasury imagwira ntchito ngati woyang'anira kwakanthawi. Izi zalembedwa moona mtima pano ndikutsatiridwa poyera. Mgwirizano wanzeru udzalowa m'malo mwa kusungidwa kwamanja mukangowunika + malo olamulira pamaketani.
